note: NOT a verbatim vendor. mldsa_sigver_slice.json is a HAND-EXTRACTED compact subset of the NIST ACVP ML-DSA sigVer (FIPS 204) internalProjection.json test vectors, restricted to the 3 vectors (1 per parameter set: ML-DSA-44/65/87) whose testGroup has signatureInterface=external, preHash=pure, AND whose own context field is the empty string. That is the ONLY combination proofbundle.pqsig.verify_mldsa(pubkey, sig, message) can exercise, because it wraps the cryptography library's pure-external ML-DSA verify with an implicit empty context and takes no context/preHash/internal-interface argument. The other 177 vectors in the 12-group / 180-test source file (non-empty context, preHash groups, and the 6 'internal' interface groups) are honestly out of scope for this API and are NOT represented here — see tests/test_mldsa_acvp_vectors.py module docstring.

files.derivation: hand-extracted (tgId,tcId) in [(1,12),(3,35),(5,62)] from the two source files below; every field copied verbatim from the source JSON (no re-encoding of pk/message/signature/context hex)

cross_validated_against.purpose: independent tcId->testPassed answer key; the 3 extracted vectors' testPassed values were confirmed to match between internalProjection.json and expectedResults.json before extraction

files.license: NIST ACVP-Server test vectors (US Government work, no repository LICENSE file asserting additional restrictions; NIST material is customarily treated as public-domain / freely reusable for conformance testing)
